## Summary

Describe the improvement you want.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve for local Qwen or llama.cpp users?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior, workflow, or documentation change you want.

## Alternatives Considered

What have you tried already, or what other options did you consider?

## Additional Context

Include benchmark data, screenshots, logs, or links if relevant.
